title: buceras polyceratia
intro: Buceras polyceratia, also known as the "Tournesol" or "Sunflower Tree," is a species of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and edible seeds. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Buceras polyceratia is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the seeds and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
